HGSS.133.0000:
Welcome to the Safari Zone!\f
For just $[0134,0001,0000], you can play the
Safari Game.\f
You can roam the wide-open Safari Zone
and catch whatever you like.\r
Would you like to play? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0001:
Owner!
Welcome to the Safari Zone!\f
For just $[0134,0001,0000], you can play the
Safari Game.\f
You can roam the wide-open Safari Zone
and catch what you like.\r
Would you like to play? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0005:
[0103,0000,0000] received [0133,0001,0000] Safari Balls
from the attendant.
HGSS.133.0006:
We’ll call for you when you run out of
Safari Balls.\r
Well, I hope you enjoy it!\f
Go, and have fun!\f
HGSS.133.0007:
You still have Safari Balls left.
Leave the Safari Zone? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0008:
Certainly.\f
Please return any Safari Balls you may
have remaining.\f
HGSS.133.0009:
Did you have fun?
Please come again!
HGSS.133.0010:
I am sorry.
You don’t have enough money.\f
I hope you will drop by again.
HGSS.133.0011:
Owner!
You don’t have enough money.\f
I hope you drop by again.
HGSS.133.0012:
I am sorry.
There is no room left in the PC!\f
Please come back after you have made
some room.
HGSS.133.0013:
Owner!
There is no room left in the PC!\f
Please come back after you have made
some room.
HGSS.133.0014:
Hi! Is it your first time here at
the Safari Zone? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0015:
Welcome, Owner!
Should I explain the Safari Zone? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0016:
At the Safari Zone, you can enjoy a
Safari Game where you are given [0133,0001,0000]\r
Safari Balls to try to catch Pokémon.\f
When you have run out of Safari Balls,
the game is over.\f
When you see a Pokémon, you can choose
to throw Bait or Mud.\f
If you throw Bait, Pokémon tend to stay
but will become more difficult to catch.\f
If you throw Mud, it will become easier
to catch, but the Pokémon may flee.\f
Have fun at the Safari Zone!
HGSS.133.0017: Have fun at the Safari Zone!
HGSS.133.0018:
Warden Baoba has something important
to share with you!
HGSS.133.0019:
This is the Area Customizer.
What would you like to know about? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0020:
The Safari Zone has six Areas.\f
Plains Area...
Peak Area...\r
and so on.\f
The Area Customizer allows you to
change the combination of these Areas.\f
What would you like to know? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0021:
Check out the machine, and you’ll see
the Area Customizer screen.\f
The lower window shows the current
Safari Zone setting.\f
Select an Area with the A Button to
swap it with another.\f
What would you like to know? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0022:
When you select an Area, then select
Swap, you will see 12 new Areas.\f
Select one of them by highlighting it and
pressing the A Button.\f
What would you like to know? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0023:
When you select an Area, then select
Order, the Area type will not change,\r
but the location can now be changed.\f
What would you like to know? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0024:
Different Areas have different Pokémon
living in them, so when you change\r
Areas, you will see different Pokémon.\f
Please do try the different Areas!
What would you like to know? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0025:
I am sorry, but this can’t be used yet.
Warden Baoba has a great plan for this\r
machine...or so he says. But even we\r
don’t know what it is. It’s a secret.
HGSS.133.0029:
Hi, I have been waiting for you!
What do you think?\f
This is a brand-new Safari Zone.
By the way...\f
I just had an idea.
Would you like to take the Owner\r
Aptitude Test? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0030:
Right on!
Let me explain how the test works.\r
It’s very easy.\f
All you have to do is to catch one
GEODUDE at the Safari and show it to me.\f
They are in the grass closest to the
entrance. It shouldn’t take long\r
before you catch one.\f
Good luck!
HGSS.133.0031:
Wow, I never thought anyone
would decline!\f
You can become the Safari Zone Owner,
don’t you see?\f
Owner...
It’s got a nice ring to it, doesn’t it?\f
You should try the test! [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0032:
Oh, wonderful!
You’ve caught a GEODUDE!\r
You’ve passed the first test.\f
..................\f
Huh? Didn’t I tell you that there are
two tests?\f
That’s right!
Becoming an owner is not that easy.\f
The second test is...
Well, I am still preparing for it.\f
I will let you know once it’s ready.
You need to wait just a little.\r
I will call you with the Pokégear.
HGSS.133.0033:
Show me the GEODUDE once you’ve
caught one.\f
They are in the grass closest to the
entrance. It shouldn’t take long.\f
Good luck!
HGSS.133.0034:
I’ve been waiting for you!
The test is ready.\f
This time can you catch a SANDSHREW
and show it to me?\f
Sounds easy, right? Not really!
SANDSHREW will not appear with the\r
current Safari Zone setting.\f
And that’s where this comes in handy!\f
HGSS.133.0035:
This sophisticated, high-tech machine
lets you customize Safari Zone Areas.\r
I call it the Area Customizer!\f
You want to know how it works,
don’t you?\r
It’s a...secret!\f
Well, you shouldn’t have trouble
operating it. Just talk to the staff\r
next to me!\f
HGSS.133.0036:
I almost forgot!\f
I was in the middle of explaining
the second test, wasn’t I?\f
You will not see SANDSHREW
with the current Safari Zone Areas,\f
so you have to use the Area Customizer
to change them.\f
SANDSHREW live in the desert!
Good luck!
HGSS.133.0037:
You did it!\f
You caught a SANDSHREW!
I knew you could do it.\f
You’ve passed the test!
You are now the Safari Zone Owner!\f
HGSS.133.0038:
I’ve always wanted to see young people
playing at the safari!\f
I thought I might get some new ideas.
That should help you complete your\r
Pokédex.\f
That’s what I have been thinking.\f
HGSS.133.0039:
By the way, though you are now the
Safari Zone Owner, would you kindly\r
continue to pay admission?\r
We have our reasons.\f
Don’t be upset. I’ll keep thinking about
how I can create new fun ways to\r
help you complete your Pokédex.\f
Go have fun at the Safari Zone!
HGSS.133.0040:
I will let you know as soon as I come up
with something new, using the Pokégear!
HGSS.133.0041:
Show me the SANDSHREW once you’ve
caught one. SANDSHREW live in the\r
desert! Good luck!
HGSS.133.0042:
Slow down.\f
Once the next test is ready, I will call
you using the Pokégear.\f
Give me some time, OK?
HGSS.133.0043:
Hi, I have been waiting for you!\f
I had an epiphany!
A new attraction!\f
I’ve decided to call it...
Object Arrangement!\f
This is going to be fun!
You can place objects on the field as\r
you play at the Safari Zone!\f
HGSS.133.0044:
Not only that, but the types of
Pokémon you see will change depending\r
on the types of objects you place.\f
Isn’t it amazing?
I will call you using the Pokégear if\r
something else comes up!\f
HGSS.133.0045:
I will explain Object Arrangement.
Would you like to know anything? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0046:
I will explain Object Arrangement.
Feel free to ask me any questions.\f
HGSS.133.0047:
There are many objects you can place
anywhere as you walk around the Safari\r
Zone, except on stairs and grass where\r
Pokémon appear!\f
You also want to remember that you can
place up to 30 objects in an Area.\f
Would you like to know anything
else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0048:
It is easy to place objects. All you
have to do is make sure that the spot\r
in front of you is clear.\f
If it’s empty, you can select
an object.\f
Some objects are large and may need a
large space.\f
Would you like to know anything
else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0049:
If you want to remove an object, just
walk up to it and check it. The objects\r
you have placed will glow in the dark.\r
It should help you at night.\f
Would you like to know anything
else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0050:
There are many different objects.
Ones that look like grass, like trees,\r
like boulders, like water, and other\r
types of objects...\f
Try placing different objects. The
number of objects placed in an Area\r
is shown in the Area Customizer\r
on the top screen.\f
There will be more objects to come,
as I’ll keep adding more.\f
Would you like to know anything
else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0051:
The types of Pokémon you see will
change depending on the types\r
of objects you place.\f
The Safari Zone is also changed
at that point. Try placing different\r
types of objects.\f
Would you like to know anything
else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0052:
Beware!\f
Once you’ve swapped Areas, the
objects you placed will all be removed.\f
Would you like to know
anything else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0053:
I hope you enjoy it!
Go, and have fun!
HGSS.133.0054:
Welcome to [0103,0000,0000]’s Safari Zone!\f
For just $500, you can play the
Safari Game.\f
You can roam the wide-open Safari Zone
and catch what you like.\r
Would you like to play? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0059:
We’ll call you when you run out of
Safari Balls.\f
Well, I’ll wish you the best of luck!\f
HGSS.133.0060:
You don’t have your friend’s
Safari Zone.\r
Sorry, but you cannot enter here.\f
Please talk to the attendant next
to me.
HGSS.133.0061:
You still have time left. Are you sure
you want to leave the Safari Zone?
HGSS.133.0062:
Certainly.\f
Please return any Safari Balls
you may have remaining.\f
HGSS.133.0063:
Did you have fun?
Please come again!
HGSS.133.0064:
I am sorry.
You don’t have enough money.\f
I hope you drop by again.
HGSS.133.0065:
Owner!\f
This is the Safari Zone Link
reception counter.\f
You can exchange Safari Zones here.\f
Would you like to link with your
friends to exchange Safari Zones? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0066:
This is the Safari Zone Link
reception counter.\f
You can exchange Safari Zones here.\f
Would you like to link with your
friends to exchange Safari Zones? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0067: Would you like to save the game?
HGSS.133.0068:
There is already a saved file.
Is it OK to overwrite it?
HGSS.133.0069:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.133.0071:
Please decide which of you two
will become the group leader.\f
The other player must then choose
“JOIN GROUP.” [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0072:
Choose the player to exchange
Safari Zones with. [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0076: Do you want to leave the group?
HGSS.133.0079:
[0103,0000,0000] has responded!\f
Would you like to exchange Safari
Zones with [0103,0000,0000]? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0081:
You are about to receive a Safari Zone.
Please wait.
HGSS.133.0083:
The Safari Zone Link is finished!\f
Please come to the reception counter
next to you.
HGSS.133.0084: I’m sorry but this cannot be used yet.
HGSS.133.0086:
DS Wireless Communications will be
launched. [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0087:
Communication error.\f
Please repeat the registration
process from the beginning.
HGSS.133.0088:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.133.0091:
The Safari Zone Areas have
been swapped.
HGSS.133.0092:
This is the reception for the
Safari Zone Link.\f
...Or should I say...is going to be.\f
We’re still not ready.
Please come back later.
HGSS.133.0093:
Owner!
This is the Safari Zone Link reception.\f
Would you like to know about the
Safari Zone Link? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0094:
This is the Safari Zone Link reception.\f
Would you like to know about
the Safari Zone Link? [0200,0000]
HGSS.133.0095:
You can exchange Safari Zones with your
friends using the Safari Zone Link.\f
You will be able to play in their
Safari Zone!\f
Areas and Pokémon will be different.
Beware!\f
The Safari Zone you receive will 
disappear after 24 hours or if you\r
receive another Safari Zone.\f
To your right is the reception for the
Safari Zone Link.\f
To your left is the reception to play in
your friend’s Safari Zone.\f
Enjoy the Safari Zone Link!
HGSS.133.0096: OK! Enjoy the Safari Zone Link!
